headline: Indonesia recorded 13,030 flood events affecting 514 regencies between 2016 and 2025, with 3,044 fatalities and 8,614,478 houses impacted.
top3_severity: The three most flood-impacted regencies by FSI are: Kabupaten Aceh Utara, Kabupaten Jayapura, Kabupaten Agam.
hot_spot_summary: 60 regencies are statistically significant flood hot spots under the Getis-Ord Gi* test (p < 0.10), comprising 21 at p < 0.01, 16 at p < 0.05, and 23 at p < 0.10. Separately, 19 regencies fall in the top-tier FSI severity class (FSI_index ≥ 75).
trend_summary: 7 of 514 regencies show a statistically significant rising trend in integrated FSI Score over the study period (Mann-Kendall on FSI_index, Hamed-Rao corrected, BH-FDR α = 0.05).
